description.value:
Fashion focused men will love the new summer-style twist in these sunglasses from cat. Keep your eyes protected from the sun's harsh rays with these stylish shades. Wear them when you're on your bike or while driving, to prevent anything from bothering your eyes.

Lens size: 61 mm
Lens colour: Brown
Frame color: Grey/Transparent
Warranty: 1 year

Tinted high optical precision and impact resistant lens
Stylised plastic frame in an aerodynamic design for absolute comfort and durability
Rounded rectangular lens for absolute style and protection from elements
Flexible hinges for durability
Fixed nose holder with a thick bridge which is part of the frame to hold the glasses in place, ensuring there is no friction with the skin

Care
Remove dust and grime by gently wiping the lens with the cloth provided
Remove oil or tough stains with the help of a lens cleaner
Do not use your fingers on such stains
Do not place glasses on uneven surface or heated areas like the dashboard of a car
